name: @artale/pi-health
description: Session health with error diagnosis for Pi. Detects error patterns, warns on degradation, tracks tool reliability.
readme:
# pi-health
Session health dashboard for Pi. Uptime, tokens, errors, tool stats, health score.
## Install
```bash
pi install npm:@artale/pi-health
```
## Commands
```
/health   — full dashboard with health score
```
